original: You’re already wearing the pads. You’ll have to remove them before you put on another set.
You can only wear one set of pads at a time.
You pull the set of sticky, form-adhering pads out of their packaging

. You quickly slip the pads into "+(pc.inventory.hasUpperUndergarment?"place":"your [pc.upperUndergarment]")+", spending a moment adjusting them so they hug the undersides of your breasts just right. As you’re working, the pads begin gently vibrating, and quickly become ever so slightly moist as the cocktail of hormones and nanomachines leaks out of the pad and into your [pc.skinFurScales].

You pull the set of sticky, form-adhering pads out of their packaging and peel off the adhesive layer underneath them before slapping them onto the undersides of your [pc.breasts "+e+"]. Once they’re secured, the pads begin gently vibrating, and quickly become ever so slightly moist as the cocktail of hormones and nanomachines leaks out of the pad and into your [pc.skinFurScales], making you go flush with sudden arousal.
You pull the set of sticky, form-adhering pads out of their packaging and peel off the adhesive layer underneath them. A bit nervously, you slip the pads

onto your flat chest. You give a little gasp as the cold adhesive adheres to you, and again as the pads turn suddenly slightly... wet. As if they’re leaking something onto your skin, and makes you go flush with a combination of sudden arousal and chill.
